---
title: "UIAO OrgTree Readiness Bundle Schema"
subtitle: "Schema Reference · orgtree-readiness.schema.json"
date: 2026-05-14
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Developer Reference

This is a UIAO JSON Schema, rendered as a developer-reference page per
[ADR-072](../../adr/adr-072-canon-publication-policy.qmd).

- **Source:** [`src/uiao/schemas/orgtree-readiness/orgtree-readiness.schema.json`](../../../src/uiao/schemas/orgtree-readiness/orgtree-readiness.schema.json)
- **Dialect:** `http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#`
- **`$id`:** `https://uiao.gov/schemas/orgtree-readiness/orgtree-readiness.schema.json`
:::

## Description

Schema for the UIAO OrgTree Readiness evidence bundle (WS-A5). Captures the AD forest archaeological survey output, OrgPath/Intune/ARC readiness plans, and HMAC-signed provenance for FedRAMP-Moderate evidence pipelines.

## Top-Level Properties

| Property | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|:---:|---|
| `version` | string | ✓ | Semantic version of the bundle format. |
| `generated_at` | string | ✓ | ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this bundle was generated. |
| `users` | array&lt;`$ref: #/definitions/adUser`&gt; | ✓ | AD user objects captured during the survey. |
| `groups` | array&lt;`$ref: #/definitions/adGroup`&gt; | ✓ | AD group objects captured during the survey. |
| `computers` | array&lt;`$ref: #/definitions/adComputer`&gt; | ✓ | AD computer (workstation) objects captured during the survey. |
| `servers` | array&lt;`$ref: #/definitions/adComputer`&gt; | ✓ | AD server objects captured during the survey. |
| `orgpath_plan` | `$ref: #/definitions/orgpathPlan` | ✓ | OrgPath assignment readiness plan derived from the AD survey. |
| `intune_plan` | `$ref: #/definitions/intunePlan` | ✓ | Intune device-enrollment readiness plan derived from the AD survey. |
| `arc_plan` | `$ref: #/definitions/arcPlan` | ✓ | Azure Arc server-onboarding readiness plan derived from the AD survey. |
| `findings` | array&lt;`$ref: #/definitions/driftFinding`&gt; | ✓ | Drift findings emitted during the survey (DRIFT-IDENTITY, DRIFT-SCHEMA, DRIFT-PROVENANCE, DRIFT-SEMANTIC). |
| `provenance` | `$ref: #/definitions/bundleProvenance` | ✓ | Bundle provenance: canon references, source survey hash, and HMAC-SHA256 signature. |
| `spn_inventory` | `$ref: #/definitions/spnInventory` |  | Optional Service Principal Name inventory artifact (MSSQLSvc/* and related service-class SPNs) captured during the AD survey. Pre/post-migration phase-tagged. Drives Kerberos delegation-chain preservation and Azure SSOT stack identity-foundation evidence per the Federal SSOT Alignment whitepaper §3.3 and OrgPath Narrative chapter 07a. |

## Full Schema

```{.json filename="orgtree-readiness.schema.json"}
{
  "$schema": "http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#",
  "$id": "https://uiao.gov/schemas/orgtree-readiness/orgtree-readiness.schema.json",
  "title": "UIAO OrgTree Readiness Bundle Schema",
  "description": "Schema for the UIAO OrgTree Readiness evidence bundle (WS-A5). Captures the AD forest archaeological survey output, OrgPath/Intune/ARC readiness plans, and HMAC-signed provenance for FedRAMP-Moderate evidence pipelines.",
  "type": "object",
  "required": [
    "version",
    "generated_at",
    "users",
    "groups",
    "computers",
    "servers",
    "orgpath_plan",
    "intune_plan",
    "arc_plan",
    "findings",
    "provenance"
  ],
  "additionalProperties": false,
  "properties": {
    "version": {
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Semantic version of the bundle format.",
      "pattern": "^[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+([-+].+)?$"
    },
    "generated_at": {
      "type": "string",
      "format": "date-time",
      "description": "ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this bundle was generated."
    },
    "users": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "AD user objects captured during the survey.",
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/definitions/adUser"
      }
    },
    "groups": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "AD group objects captured during the survey.",
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/definitions/adGroup"
      }
    },
    "computers": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "AD computer (workstation) objects captured during the survey.",
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/definitions/adComputer"
      }
    },
    "servers": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "AD server objects captured during the survey.",
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/definitions/adComputer"
      }
    },
    "orgpath_plan": {
      "$ref": "#/definitions/orgpathPlan",
      "description": "OrgPath assignment readiness plan derived from the AD survey."
    },
    "intune_plan": {
      "$ref": "#/definitions/intunePlan",
      "description": "Intune device-enrollment readiness plan derived from the AD survey."
    },
    "arc_plan": {
      "$ref": "#/definitions/arcPlan",
      "description": "Azure Arc server-onboarding readiness plan derived from the AD survey."
    },
    "findings": {
      "type": "array",
      "description": "Drift findings emitted during the survey (DRIFT-IDENTITY, DRIFT-SCHEMA, DRIFT-PROVENANCE, DRIFT-SEMANTIC).",
      "items": {
        "$ref": "#/definitions/driftFinding"
      }
    },
    "provenance": {
      "$ref": "#/definitions/bundleProvenance",
      "description": "Bundle provenance: canon references, source survey hash, and HMAC-SHA256 signature."
    },
    "spn_inventory": {
      "$ref": "#/definitions/spnInventory",
      "description": "Optional Service Principal Name inventory artifact (MSSQLSvc/* and related service-class SPNs) captured during the AD survey. Pre/post-migration phase-tagged. Drives Kerberos delegation-chain preservation and Azure SSOT stack identity-foundation evidence per the Federal SSOT Alignment whitepaper \u00a73.3 and OrgPath Narrative chapter 07a."
    }
  },
  "definitions": {
    "adUser": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "Minimal AD user record from the survey pass.",
      "required": [
        "dn"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": true,
      "properties": {
        "dn": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Canonical distinguished name."
        },
        "sam_account_name": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "user_principal_name": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "display_name": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "enabled": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "orgpath": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Resolved OrgPath (ORG-XX or empty when unresolved)."
        },
        "source_forest": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "last_logon_timestamp": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        }
      }
    },
    "adGroup": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "AD group record from the survey pass.",
      "required": [
        "dn"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": true,
      "properties": {
        "dn": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "sam_account_name": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "group_scope": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "DomainLocal",
            "Global",
            "Universal"
          ]
        },
        "group_type": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "Security",
            "Distribution"
          ]
        },
        "member_count": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "source_forest": {
          "type": "string"
        }
      }
    },
    "adComputer": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "AD computer or server record from the survey pass.",
      "required": [
        "dn"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": true,
      "properties": {
        "dn": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "dns_host_name": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "operating_system": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "operating_system_version": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "enabled": {
          "type": "boolean"
        },
        "last_logon_timestamp": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "source_forest": {
          "type": "string"
        }
      }
    },
    "orgpathPlan": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "OrgPath assignment readiness plan.",
      "additionalProperties": true,
      "properties": {
        "total_users": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "resolved_count": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "unresolved_count": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "coverage_pct": {
          "type": "number",
          "minimum": 0,
          "maximum": 100
        },
        "unresolved_dns": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "ou_orgpath_map": {
          "type": "object",
          "additionalProperties": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "intunePlan": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "Intune device-enrollment readiness plan.",
      "additionalProperties": true,
      "properties": {
        "total_computers": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "enroll_ready_count": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "enroll_blocked_count": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "blocked_dns": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "readiness_pct": {
          "type": "number",
          "minimum": 0,
          "maximum": 100
        }
      }
    },
    "arcPlan": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "Azure Arc server-onboarding readiness plan.",
      "additionalProperties": true,
      "properties": {
        "total_servers": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "onboard_ready_count": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "onboard_blocked_count": {
          "type": "integer",
          "minimum": 0
        },
        "blocked_dns": {
          "type": "array",
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "readiness_pct": {
          "type": "number",
          "minimum": 0,
          "maximum": 100
        }
      }
    },
    "driftFinding": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "A single drift finding emitted by the AD survey.",
      "required": [
        "drift_class",
        "severity",
        "path",
        "detail"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": true,
      "properties": {
        "drift_class": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "DRIFT-SCHEMA",
            "DRIFT-SEMANTIC",
            "DRIFT-PROVENANCE",
            "DRIFT-IDENTITY"
          ],
          "description": "Five-class drift taxonomy per UIAO DriftDetectionStandard."
        },
        "severity": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "P1",
            "P2",
            "P3",
            "P4"
          ]
        },
        "path": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Canonical object path or distinguished name."
        },
        "detail": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Human-readable description of the finding."
        },
        "error_code": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "GOV-MIG-NNN or GOV-DRF-NNN error code."
        },
        "object_type": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "AD object type (User, Computer, OU, GPO, ServiceAccount, Site)."
        },
        "source_forest": {
          "type": "string"
        },
        "suggested_orgpath": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Best-effort OrgPath candidate; empty when unresolvable."
        }
      }
    },
    "bundleProvenance": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "Provenance block: canon document references, source hash, and HMAC signature.",
      "required": [
        "schema_id",
        "schema_version",
        "source_hash",
        "signature",
        "hmac_alg"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "schema_id": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "$id of the validating JSON Schema."
        },
        "schema_version": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Version of the schema used to validate this bundle."
        },
        "canon_refs": {
          "type": "array",
          "description": "UIAO_NNN canon document IDs referenced by this bundle.",
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "source_hash": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "SHA-256 hex digest of the canonicalized survey input JSON.",
          "pattern": "^[0-9a-fA-F]{64}$"
        },
        "signature": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "HMAC-SHA256 hex digest of the canonicalized bundle content (env var UIAO_BUNDLE_HMAC_KEY).",
          "pattern": "^[0-9a-fA-F]{64}$"
        },
        "hmac_alg": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "HMAC algorithm identifier.",
          "enum": [
            "hmac-sha256"
          ]
        },
        "actor": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Identity that produced this bundle (CLI invocation context)."
        }
      }
    },
    "spnInventory": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "Service Principal Name inventory artifact. Captures MSSQLSvc/* (and related service-class) SPNs registered in the AD forest, with pre/post-migration phase tagging, OrgPath attribution, and drift-finding back-reference when the SPN cannot be attributed to a verified organizational position.",
      "required": [
        "phase",
        "discovery_timestamp",
        "discovery_method",
        "records"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "phase": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "pre_migration",
            "post_migration",
            "unspecified"
          ],
          "description": "Migration phase the inventory was captured in. 'unspecified' is used when the caller does not assert a migration phase (e.g. baseline scans outside of a migration window)."
        },
        "discovery_timestamp": {
          "type": "string",
          "format": "date-time",
          "description": "ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the SPN enumeration was performed."
        },
        "discovery_method": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "AD-SPN-LDAP",
            "AD-SPN-POWERSHELL",
            "AD-SPN-DSQUERY"
          ],
          "description": "Mechanism used to enumerate SPNs from the directory. AD-SPN-LDAP is the survey adapter's default."
        },
        "discovery_scope": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Free-form scope label (domain DN, forest root, or 'GC://forest-root' for Global Catalog queries)."
        },
        "service_class_filter": {
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Service-class prefixes the inventory was filtered to. Empty/omitted means MSSQLSvc only.",
          "items": {
            "type": "string"
          }
        },
        "records": {
          "type": "array",
          "description": "Per-SPN records.",
          "items": {
            "$ref": "#/definitions/spnRecord"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "spnRecord": {
      "type": "object",
      "description": "Single SPN registration record. One row per SPN string (a principal with N MSSQLSvc SPNs produces N records).",
      "required": [
        "spn",
        "service_class",
        "principal_name",
        "object_class"
      ],
      "additionalProperties": false,
      "properties": {
        "spn": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Full SPN string, e.g. 'MSSQLSvc/sql01.corp.example.com:1433'."
        },
        "service_class": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Service-class prefix of the SPN, e.g. 'MSSQLSvc'."
        },
        "host_or_fqdn": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Hostname or FQDN portion of the SPN (everything after the service class, before the first ':')."
        },
        "port_or_instance": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "description": "Port number (e.g. '1433') or named instance ('SQL2K22'); null when the SPN has no ':' suffix."
        },
        "principal_name": {
          "type": "string",
          "description": "Common name of the AD principal that registered the SPN."
        },
        "sam_account_name": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "object_class": {
          "type": "string",
          "enum": [
            "user",
            "computer",
            "msDS-GroupManagedServiceAccount",
            "msDS-ManagedServiceAccount",
            "other"
          ],
          "description": "AD objectClass of the SPN-registering principal."
        },
        "distinguished_name": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ]
        },
        "when_created": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "format": "date-time"
        },
        "when_changed": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "format": "date-time"
        },
        "principal_orgpath": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "description": "OrgPath of the SPN-registering principal (preferred attribution hook). Null when the principal cannot be resolved to an OrgPath."
        },
        "hosting_computer_orgpath": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "description": "OrgPath of the hosting computer derived from host_or_fqdn (fallback attribution hook). Null when the host computer cannot be resolved."
        },
        "drift_finding_ref": {
          "type": [
            "string",
            "null"
          ],
          "description": "Reference (path or error_code) into the bundle 'findings' array when neither principal_orgpath nor hosting_computer_orgpath resolves and a DRIFT-IDENTITY finding has been emitted. Null when attribution succeeded."
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
```
